java.lang.invoke/VarHandle/get.name: get
java.lang.invoke/VarHandle/get.description:
Returns the value of a variable, with memory semantics of reading as
if the variable was declared non-volatile.

info.excerpt:
Returns the value of a variable, with memory semantics of reading as
if the variable was declared non-volatile.

java.lang.invoke/VarHandle/getAcquire.name: getAcquire
java.lang.invoke/VarHandle/getAcquire.description:
Returns the value of a variable, and ensures that subsequent loads and
stores are not reordered before this access.

info.excerpt:
Returns the value of a variable, and ensures that subsequent loads and
stores are not reordered before this access.

java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getCap.name: getCapturedArg
java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getCap.description: Get a dynamic argument to the lambda capture site.

info.excerpt: Get a dynamic argument to the lambda capture site.

java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getCap.name: getCapturedArgCount
java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getCap.description: Get the count of dynamic arguments to the lambda capture site.

info.excerpt: Get the count of dynamic arguments to the lambda capture site.

java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getCap.name: getCapturingClass
java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getCap.description: Get the name of the class that captured this lambda.

info.excerpt: Get the name of the class that captured this lambda.

java.lang.invoke/MethodHandleInfo/getDec.name: getDeclaringClass
java.lang.invoke/MethodHandleInfo/getDec.description: Returns the class in which the cracked method handle's underlying member was defined.

info.excerpt: Returns the class in which the cracked method handle's underlying member was defined.

java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getFun.name: getFunctionalInterfaceClass
java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getFun.description:
Get the name of the invoked type to which this
lambda has been converted

info.excerpt:
Get the name of the invoked type to which this
lambda has been converted

java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getFun.name: getFunctionalInterfaceMethodName
java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getFun.description:
Get the name of the primary method for the functional interface
to which this lambda has been converted.

info.excerpt:
Get the name of the primary method for the functional interface
to which this lambda has been converted.

java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getFun.name: getFunctionalInterfaceMethodSignature
java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getFun.description:
Get the signature of the primary method for the functional
interface to which this lambda has been converted.

info.excerpt:
Get the signature of the primary method for the functional
interface to which this lambda has been converted.

java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getImp.name: getImplClass
java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getImp.description:
Get the name of the class containing the implementation
method.

info.excerpt:
Get the name of the class containing the implementation
method.

java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getImp.name: getImplMethodKind
java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getImp.description:
Get the method handle kind (seeMethodHandleInfo) of
the implementation method.

info.excerpt:
Get the method handle kind (seeMethodHandleInfo) of
the implementation method.

java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getImp.name: getImplMethodName

info.excerpt: Get the name of the implementation method.

java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getImp.name: getImplMethodSignature
java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getImp.description: Get the signature of the implementation method.

info.excerpt: Get the signature of the implementation method.

java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getIns.name: getInstantiatedMethodType
java.lang.invoke/SerializedLambda/getIns.description:
Get the signature of the primary functional interface method
after type variables are substituted with their instantiation
from the capture site.

info.excerpt:
Get the signature of the primary functional interface method
after type variables are substituted with their instantiation
from the capture site.

java.lang.invoke/MethodHandleInfo/getMet.name: getMethodType
java.lang.invoke/MethodHandleInfo/getMet.description: Returns the nominal type of the cracked symbolic reference, expressed as a method type.

info.excerpt: Returns the nominal type of the cracked symbolic reference, expressed as a method type.

java.lang.invoke/MethodHandleInfo/getMod.name: getModifiers
java.lang.invoke/MethodHandleInfo/getMod.description: Returns the access modifiers of the underlying member.

info.excerpt: Returns the access modifiers of the underlying member.

java.lang.invoke/MethodHandleInfo/getNam.name: getName
java.lang.invoke/MethodHandleInfo/getNam.description: Returns the name of the cracked method handle's underlying member.

info.excerpt: Returns the name of the cracked method handle's underlying member.

java.lang.invoke/VarHandle/getOpaque.name: getOpaque
java.lang.invoke/VarHandle/getOpaque.description:
Returns the value of a variable, accessed in program order, but with no
assurance of memory ordering effects with respect to other threads.

info.excerpt:
Returns the value of a variable, accessed in program order, but with no
assurance of memory ordering effects with respect to other threads.

java.lang.invoke/MethodHandleInfo/getRef.name: getReferenceKind
java.lang.invoke/MethodHandleInfo/getRef.description:
Returns the reference kind of the cracked method handle, which in turn
determines whether the method handle's underlying member was a constructor, method, or field.

info.excerpt:
Returns the reference kind of the cracked method handle, which in turn
determines whether the method handle's underlying member was a constructor, method, or field.

java.lang.invoke/ConstantBootstraps/getS.name: getStaticFinal
signatures: public static Object getStaticFinal(MethodHandles.Lookup lookup, String name, Class<?> type)
public static Object getStaticFinal(MethodHandles.Lookup lookup, String name, Class<?> type, Class<?> declaringClass)
java.lang.invoke/ConstantBootstraps/getS.description:
Returns the value of a static final field declared in the class which
is the same as the field's type (or, for primitive-valued fields,
declared in the wrapper class.)

info.excerpt:
Returns the value of a static final field declared in the class which
is the same as the field's type (or, for primitive-valued fields,
declared in the wrapper class.)

java.lang.invoke/CallSite/getTarget.name: getTarget
java.lang.invoke/CallSite/getTarget.description:
Returns the target method of the call site, according to the
behavior defined by this call site's specific class.

info.excerpt:
Returns the target method of the call site, according to the
behavior defined by this call site's specific class.

java.lang.invoke/ConstantCallSite/getTar.name: getTarget
java.lang.invoke/ConstantCallSite/getTar.description:
Returns the target method of the call site, which behaves
like afinalfield of theConstantCallSite.

info.excerpt:
Returns the target method of the call site, which behaves
like afinalfield of theConstantCallSite.

java.lang.invoke/MutableCallSite/getTarg.name: getTarget
java.lang.invoke/MutableCallSite/getTarg.description:
Returns the target method of the call site, which behaves
like a normal field of theMutableCallSite.

info.excerpt:
Returns the target method of the call site, which behaves
like a normal field of theMutableCallSite.

java.lang.invoke/VolatileCallSite/getTar.name: getTarget
java.lang.invoke/VolatileCallSite/getTar.description:
Returns the target method of the call site, which behaves
like avolatilefield of theVolatileCallSite.

info.excerpt:
Returns the target method of the call site, which behaves
like avolatilefield of theVolatileCallSite.

java.lang.invoke/VarHandle/getVolatile.name: getVolatile
java.lang.invoke/VarHandle/getVolatile.description:
Returns the value of a variable, with memory semantics of reading as if
the variable was declaredvolatile.

info.excerpt:
Returns the value of a variable, with memory semantics of reading as if
the variable was declaredvolatile.

java.lang.invoke/MethodHandles/guardWith.name: guardWithTest
signatures: public static MethodHandle guardWithTest(MethodHandle test, MethodHandle target, MethodHandle fallback)
java.lang.invoke/MethodHandles/guardWith.description:
Makes a method handle which adapts a target method handle,
by guarding it with a test, a boolean-valued method handle.

info.excerpt:
Makes a method handle which adapts a target method handle,
by guarding it with a test, a boolean-valued method handle.

java.lang.invoke/SwitchPoint/guardWithTe.name: guardWithTest
signatures: public MethodHandle guardWithTest(MethodHandle target, MethodHandle fallback)
java.lang.invoke/SwitchPoint/guardWithTe.description: Returns a method handle which always delegates either to the target or the fallback.

info.excerpt: Returns a method handle which always delegates either to the target or the fallback.
